description: Allows the app to read and write the full set of profile properties, reports, and managers of other users in your organization, and read basic company properties, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Manage installed Teams apps in chats
name: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentForChat
description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in chats the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific chats' data.

displayName: Read and write your organization's M365 cross tenant access capabilities
name: Policy.ReadWrite.CrossTenantCapability
description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's M365 cross tenant access capabilities on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read installed Teams apps in teams
name: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadForTeam
description: Allows the app to read the Teams apps that are installed in teams the signed-in user can access. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

displayName: Read and write users' class assignments and their grades
name: EduAssignments.ReadWrite
description: Allows the app to read and write assignments and their grades on behalf of the user.

displayName: Read and write API connectors for authentication flows
name: APIConnectors.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read, create and manage the API connectors used in user authentication flows, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in teams
name: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTeam
description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in teams the signed-in user can access. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

displayName: Read terms of use acceptance statuses that user can access
name: AgreementAcceptance.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read terms of use acceptance statuses on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read the names and descriptions of channels
name: Channel.ReadBasic.All
description: Read channel names and channel descriptions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read all acronyms that the user can access
name: Acronym.Read.All
description: Allows an app to read all acronyms that the signed-in user can access.

displayName: Read and write trust framework key sets
name: TrustFrameworkKeySet.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write trust framework key set properties on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write all users' passkey methods
name: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write passkey authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

displayName: Read all published labels and label policies for an organization.
name: InformationProtectionPolicy.Read.All
description: Allows an app to read published sensitivity labels and label policy settings for the entire organization or a specific user, without a signed in user.

displayName: Read your organization's device configuration policies
name: Policy.Read.DeviceConfiguration
description: Allows the app to read your organization's device configuration policies on behalf of the signed-in user.  For example, device registration policy can limit initial provisioning controls using quota restrictions, additional authentication and authorization checks.

displayName: Read and create online meetings
name: OnlineMeetings.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and create online meetings as an application in your organization.

displayName: Read user's print jobs
name: PrintJob.Read
description: Allows the application to read the metadata and document content of print jobs that the signed-in user created.

displayName: Read and write financials data
name: Financials.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write financials data on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write Teams devices
name: TeamworkDevice.ReadWrite.All
description: Allow the app to read and write the management data for Teams devices on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Manage learning provider
name: LearningProvider.ReadWrite
description: Allows the app to create, update, read, and delete data for the learning provider in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read organization-wide copilot limited mode setting
name: CopilotSettings-LimitedMode.Read
description: Allows the app to read organization-wide copilot limited mode setting on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write your virtual events
name: VirtualEvent.ReadWrite
description: Allows the app to read and write virtual events for you

displayName: Read Cloud PCs
name: CloudPC.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read the properties of Cloud PCs on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Access media streams in a call as an app
name: Calls.AccessMedia.All
description: Allows the app to get direct access to media streams in a call, without a signed-in user.

displayName: Read subject rights requests
name: SubjectRightsRequest.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read subject rights requests on behalf of the signed-in user

displayName: Read and write subject rights requests
name: SubjectRightsRequest.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write subject rights requests on behalf of the signed-in user

displayName: Read and write all device authentication certificate configurations
name: MutualTlsOauthConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to the and write all device authentication certificate configurations on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read shared cross-tenant user profile and export or delete data
name: CrossTenantUserProfileSharing.ReadWrite
description: Allows the application to list and query user profile information associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.  It also permits the application to export and remove external user data (e.g. customer content or system-generated logs), associated with the current tenant on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write print connectors
name: PrintConnector.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the application to read and write print connectors on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write entitlement management resources
name: EntitlementManagement.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to request access to and management of access packages and related entitlement management resources on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read learning content
name: LearningContent.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read learning content in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read user contacts
name: Contacts.Read
description: Allows the app to read user contacts.

displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage only its own tabs in chats
name: TeamsTab.ReadWriteSelfForChat
description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall its own tabs in chats the signed-in user can access.

displayName: Read the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes
name: CustomSecAttributeProvisioning.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read the provisioning configuration of all active custom security attributes on behalf of a signed in user.

displayName: Read and write your organization's directory access review default policy
name: Policy.ReadWrite.AccessReview
description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's directory access review default policy on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read external user profiles
name: ExternalUserProfile.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read available properties of external user profiles, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read, write and update print task definitions
name: PrintTaskDefinition.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the application to read and update print task definitions without a signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write all Azure AD synchronization data
name: Synchronization.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to configure the Azure AD synchronization service, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write custom security attribute definitions
name: CustomSecAttributeDefinition.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write custom security attribute definitions for the tenant on behalf of a signed in user.

displayName: Read and write all scenario monitoring alert configurations
name: HealthMonitoringAlertConfig.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write all scenario monitoring alert configurations, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings
name: OrgSettings-Microsoft365Install.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide Microsoft 365 apps installation settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write your organization's external identities policy
name: Policy.ReadWrite.ExternalIdentities
description: Allows the application to read and update the organization's external identities policy on behalf of the signed-in user.  For example, external identities policy controls if users invited to access resources in your organization via B2B collaboration or B2B direct connect are allowed to self-service leave.

displayName: Read tags in Teams
name: TeamworkTag.Read
description: Allows the app to read tags in Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read metadata and detection details for emails in your organization
name: SecurityAnalyzedMessage.Read.All
description: Read email metadata and security detection details on behalf of the signed in user.

displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage all tabs for all teams
name: TeamsTab.ReadWriteForTeam.All
description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall all tabs in any team, without a signed-in user.

displayName: Read all network access information
name: NetworkAccess.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read all network access information on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Access directory as the signed in user
name: Directory.AccessAsUser.All
description: Allows the app to have the same access to information in the directory as the signed-in user.

displayName: Read your organization's security actions
name: SecurityActions.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read security actions, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Send mail on behalf of others
name: Mail.Send.Shared
description: Allows the app to send mail as the signed-in user, including sending on-behalf of others.

displayName: Send a teamwork activity as the user
name: TeamsActivity.Send
description: Allows the app to create new notifications in users' teamwork activity feeds on behalf of the signed in user. These notifications may not be discoverable or be held or governed by compliance policies.

displayName: Create a device from a device template owned by the signed-in user
name: Device.CreateFromOwnedTemplate

displayName: Read all emergency call events
name: CallEvents-Emergency.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read emergency call event information for all users in your organization without a signed-in user.

displayName: Read all chat messages
name: Chat.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read all 1-to-1 or group chat messages in Microsoft Teams.

displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of Teams apps for all teams
name: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteAndConsentForTeam.All
description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in any team, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

displayName: Read and write group conversations
name: Group-Conversation.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write group conversations that the signed-in user has access to.

displayName: Have full access to user calendars
name: Calendars.ReadWrite

name: ThreatIndicators.ReadWrite.OwnedBy

displayName: View current and previous runs
name: IndustryData-Run.Read.All

displayName: Manage Teams apps for all chats
name: TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForChat.All
description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps in any chat, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

displayName: Read directory RBAC settings
name: RoleManagement.Read.Directory
description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.  This includes reading directory role templates, directory roles and memberships.

displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage itself for all chats

displayName: Read and write your organization's conditional access policies

displayName: Read custom security attribute assignments

displayName: Read and write all network access information
name: NetworkAccess.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write all network access information and configuration settings on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read Delegated Admin relationships with customers
name: DelegatedAdminRelationship.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read details of delegated admin relationships with customers like access details (that includes roles) and the duration as well as specific role assignments to security groups on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read all network access reports
name: NetworkAccess-Reports.Read.All
description: Allows the app to read all network access reports on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read items in external datasets
name: ExternalItem.Read.All
description: Allow the app to read external datasets and content, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write all assignments
name: LearningAssignedCourse.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to create, update, read and delete all assignments in the organization's directory, without a signed-in user.

displayName: Send user chat messages
name: ChatMessage.Send
description: Allows an app to send one-to-one and group chat messages in Microsoft Teams, on behalf of the signed-in user.

displayName: Read and write organizational branding information
name: OrganizationalBranding.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write the organizational branding resources, on behalf of the signed-in user.
